channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Chairs and domestic rubbish bags in the usual spot on Lassell Street, 18th April
item.description:
Great if you can clear these

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Trafalgar Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Still more rubbish, 18th April
item.description:
More rubbish dumped in the corner next to the bin store. As soon as it's cleared more is left. Could a letter be sent to the residents of Church Crescent flats telling them to use the Chelsfield Point bins instead, please?
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bodney Road dog fouling, 18th April
item.description:
Bodney Road is being covered in dog poo. Please do something.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pembury Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Taking up parking while illegal, 18th April
item.description:
Been left on road untaxed

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Godstow Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive litter, 18th April
item.description:
Litter

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Thistlewaite Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bikes on footway, 18th April
item.description:
Three bikes have been parked on the footway making it impossible for anyone with limited mobility to use the path.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Larkhall Rise, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Smells like a public toilet, 18th April
item.description:
Couldn’t sit at the bus stop due to the smell of very strong urine

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 223, Bexley Road, Avery Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 18th April
item.description:
Lots of rubbish bugs left outside 78

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lakedale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole on road with 15 percent gradient so very dangerous for cyclists, 18th April
item.description:
See above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westwood Park, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole on middle of road with 15 percent gradient so very dangerous for cyclists, 18th April
item.description:
See above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westwood Park, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in middle of road with 15 percent gradient so very dangerous for cyclists, 18th April
item.description:
See above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westwood Park, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drilling rig, 18th April
item.description:
Long drilling rig LV66 FWX attached to tow bar on car FL75APX which is illegal.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 90, Bushey Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking in a Disabled Place, 18th April
item.description:
This car appears to have no Blue Badge displayed and has parked a bay designated for Disabled use only.

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Southwark cleaning bags, 18th April
item.description:
Southwark cleaning bags next to the cycle hanger on the corner of Sutherland Square and Sutherland Walk SE17

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sutherland Square, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite Tool Station, close to Social Club., 18th April
item.description:
Abandoned bike plus the green area looks very messy around with a lot of rubbish.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eastnor Road, New Eltham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ada St charging bollard knocked down, 18th April
item.description:
The charging area bollard has been knocked down on Ada Street.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ada Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins lining the street, 18th April
item.description:
The bins need to be put in. It will be reported daily until fixed. Each of these properties have front gardens and rear access through private gates It is extreme laziness of residents blocking the pathway for others, attracting vermin and breaching the conservation guidelines set out by council.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Johns Park, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lorry filled with rubbish, 18th April
item.description:
This opensided lorry is filled with rubbish and has been here for quite a time. Could it be used for flytipping?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Barnfield Wood Road, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead tree, 18th April
item.description:
Hi there, This tree has died. It had mushrooms and fungus at the base a while ago. Please don’t just chop it down though, can you replace it with a fresh tree and also the one across the road where there is a gap after you chopped that one down after it became damaged Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southwood Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo needs clearing, 18th April
item.description:
Location in the space between Finland street and ship and whale pub

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Commercial Dock Passage, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
